mapper.insert:
SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()
INSERT INTO tbl_product(pname, pdesc, price, sale, writer) VALUES(#{pname}, #{pdesc}, #{price}, TRUE, #{writer})

INSERT INTO tbl_product_image (pno, filename, uuid, ord) VALUES
(#{pno}, #{image.fileName}, #{image.uuid}, #{image.ord})
mapper.select: SELECT p.pno, pname, pdesc, price, sale, writer, p.regdate, ino, uuid, filename, ord FROM tbl_product p LEFT JOIN tbl_product_image pimg ON p.pno = pimg.pno WHERE p.pno = #{pno} ORDER BY pimg.ord
SELECT * FROM tbl_product p LEFT JOIN tbl_product_image pimg ON p.pno = pimg.pno WHERE pimg.ord = 0 ORDER BY p.pno DESC LIMIT #{count} OFFSET #{skip};
